commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `session_status` semantic-current resolution to prefer the full effective requester key before alias fallback, with WebChat regressions for persisted and unpersisted `agent:admin:main` lookups.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +56. Total +71 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can leave WebChat `sessionKey: "current"` unresolved when no `runSessionKey` exists, then fall through to alias/main lookup instead of the full effective requester key. I did not run a live WebChat scenario in this read-only pass.
